description: Scripted 3-worker dispatch for multi-ministry query test
citizen_request: 이사 준비 중인데, 전입신고랑 자동차 주소변경이랑 건강보험 주소변경 다 해야 하는데

coordinator_responses.content: I need to spawn three workers for: civil_affairs (residence transfer), transport (vehicle address change), health_insurance (health insurance update).
Based on worker results, here is the unified plan.

civil_affairs.content: Residence transfer requires visiting the district office.

transport.content: Vehicle address change can be done online.

health_insurance.content: Health insurance address change is automatic after residence transfer.

responses.content: I need to dispatch three specialist workers for this multi-ministry request.
